name: MeterGroup
description: MeterGroup is a group of process status indicators.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Specifies the layout of the component, valid values are 'horizontal' and 'vertical'.

props.name: labelPosition
props.description: Specifies the label position of the component, valid values are 'start' and 'end'.

props.name: labelOrientation
props.description: Specifies the label orientation of the component, valid values are 'horizontal' and 'vertical'.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

slots.name: label
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Current value of the component */ value: MeterItem[]; /** * Total percent of the metergroup items */ totalPercent: number; /** * Array of sequential sum of values of metergroup items */ percentages: number[]; }): VNode[]

slots.name: meter
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Current value of the meter item */ value: MeterItem; /** * Current index of the meter item */ index: number; /** * Style class of the meter item */ class: string; /** * Current orientation of the component */ orientation: string; /** * Current width of the meter item */ size: string; /** * Total percent of the metergroup items */ totalPercent: number; }): VNode[]

slots.name: icon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Current value of the component */ value: MeterItem; /** * Style class of the icon */ class: string; }): VNode[]

slots.name: start
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Current value of the component */ value: MeterItem[]; /** * Total percent of the metergroup items */ totalPercent: number; /** * Array of sequential sum of values of metergroup items */ percentages: number[]; }): VNode[]

slots.name: end
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Current value of the component */ value: MeterItem[]; /** * Total percent of the metergroup items */ totalPercent: number; /** * Array of sequential sum of values of metergroup items */ percentages: number[]; }): VNode[]
